Replacement shift.to: AI handles the repetitive stuff so I can focus on what actually needs me

Expertise shift.from: I need to be an expert first
Expertise shift.to: I learn by doing, and imperfect first attempts are how skills develop

Failure shift.from: What if I get it wrong?
Failure shift.to: What if I don't try and get left behind?

ai_spectrum_descriptions.L1 - Search Engine: Using AI to look things up
ai_spectrum_descriptions.L2 - First Draft: Getting AI to create a starting point
ai_spectrum_descriptions.L3 - Thinking Partner: Using AI to challenge and refine your thinking
ai_spectrum_descriptions.L4 - Workflow Collaborator: Integrating AI into your daily workflow

atomic_action_descriptions.The First Experiment: Try one AI-assisted task this week
atomic_action_descriptions.The Verification Question: Before trusting AI output, ask: How would I verify this?
